A small apple orchard planted on public land for the community. Be respectful and leave plenty for others. Falling Fruit season: September-October.

The black raspberries line the parking lot edge here. Quite abundant enough to replace buying any inside the store. They do seem to ripen on the early end compared to other patches I've seen. Falling Fruit season: June-July.
This tree seems to ripen on the early side. Falling Fruit season: June-June.
W282N2063 Beach Dr, Pewaukee, WI 53072, USA
